p2p_enrich.notes: Added 5 new repo_tests pass_to_pass checks: test_repo_opencode_package_scripts (verifies typecheck/test/build scripts defined), test_repo_turbo_config_valid (verifies turbo.json has typecheck/build tasks), test_repo_tsconfig_valid (verifies root tsconfig extends @tsconfig/bun), test_repo_opencode_tsconfig_valid (verifies opencode package tsconfig), test_repo_node_syntax_check (Node.js-based syntax validation). Docker image built successfully. CI commands discovered from repo: bun turbo typecheck (from .github/workflows/typecheck.yml), bun turbo test (from .github/workflows/test.yml). Bun is not installed in the Docker container, so we use static file validation instead of running actual CI commands.
